data.content: Implementation review REJECTED: All 8 scoped files still have ESLint warnings for max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and/or max-len (45 total warnings). No files were actually refactored. Specific issues: agent-history-view.tsx (1142 lines, AgentHistoryView 638-line function, 8 long lines), beat-columns.tsx (709 lines, getBeatColumns 428-line function), beat-detail-lightbox.tsx (541 lines, BeatDetailLightbox 161-line function), beat-table.tsx (1116 lines, BeatTable 395-line function, BeatTableContent 146-line function, 7 long lines, 3 unused vars), history-debug-panel.tsx (HistoryDebugPanel 276-line function, 1 long line), interaction-picker.tsx (575 lines, useInteractionPicker 186-line function, 1 long line), lease-audit-view.tsx (532 lines, TimeseriesChart 148 lines, LeaseAuditView 162 lines, 1 long line), terminal-panel.tsx (803 lines, TerminalPanel 683-line function, 2 arrow fns over 100 lines, 3 long lines). Also: unused vars in beat-table.tsx (activeRepo, registeredRepos, updateUrl) and beat-columns.tsx (onCloseBeat).
